# attachableValue

**Instance Property**

The value of this attachment.

## Declaration

```swift
var attachableValue: AttachableValue.Wrapped { get }
```

## Discussion

When the attachable value’s type conforms to [doc://org.swift.testing/documentation/Testing/AttachableWrapper], the value of this property equals the wrapper’s underlying attachable value. To access the attachable value as an instance of `T` (where `T` conforms to [doc://org.swift.testing/documentation/Testing/AttachableWrapper]), specify the type explicitly:

```swift
let attachableValue = attachment.attachableValue as T
```
title: attachableValue
